description: Monthly pension provided to citizens above 60 years with low income to support their basic livelihood needs.
Financial assistance given to widowed women to help them sustain their household after loss of earning member.
Income-based financial relief scheme for citizens employed in lower-income civil service roles in Chhattisgarh.
Educational scholarships for students from economically weaker sections to support school and college education.
One-time financial assistance provided to families below poverty line during times of distress or death of breadwinner.
